"CWE-807", "name": "Reliance on Untrusted Inputs in a Security Decision"}], "description": "## Summary
diffs viewer misclassifies proxied remote requests as loopback when `allowRemoteViewer` is disabled

## Current Maintainer Triage
- Status: open
- Normalized severity: low
- Assessment: Shipped v2026.3.28 misclassified proxied diff-viewer requests as local loopback in some cases, a real but low-severity access-control flaw.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published npm version: `2026.3.31`
- Vulnerable version range: `<=2026.3.28`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- First stable tag containing the fix: `v2026.3.31`

## Fix Commit(s)
- `30a1690323088fd291abd11643a264a6828a002c` — 2026-03-30T14:17:27-06:00

## Release Process Note
- The fix is already present in released version `2026.3.31`.
- This draft looks ready for final maintainer disposition or publication, not additional code-fix work.

Thanks @smaeljaish771 for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00259, "percentile": 0.17024}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3xv9-89fm-7h4r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-03T03:24:25Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3xv9-89fm-7h4r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3xv9-89fm-7h4r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41403"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T19:37:43Z", "published_at": "2026-04-03T03:24:25Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-3xv9-89fm-7h4r", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/30a1690323088fd291abd11643a264a6828a002c", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.3.31", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41403", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-access-control-bypass-via-proxied-remote-request-misclassification", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3xv9-89fm-7h4r"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-3xv9-89fm-7h4r", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: diffs viewer misclassifies proxied remote requests as loopback when `allowRemoteViewer` is disabled", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T20:32:45Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3xv9-89fm-7h4r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.28"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: diffs viewer misclassifies proxied remote requests as loopback when `allowRemoteViewer` is disabled
